html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Hallowed Nights

“A 14 slots container for holding Candies, Trinkets, and Decorations.”

-

A Candy Bag is a 14-slot container. It is similar to Backpack but can only store Halloween Candies, Hallowed Trinkets and Halloween Decorations, as well as regular Trinkets. It can be crafted with 6 Cut Grass.

Gallery

  • Wilson wearing a Candy Bag.
  • Willow wearing a Candy Bag.
  • Wolfgang wearing a Candy Bag.
  • Wendy wearing a Candy Bag.
  • WX-78 wearing a Candy Bag.
  • Wickerbottom wearing a Candy Bag.
  • Woodie wearing a Candy Bag.
  • Wes wearing a Candy Bag.
  • Maxwell wearing a Candy Bag.
  • Wigfrid wearing a Candy Bag.
  • Webber wearing a Candy Bag.
  • Winona wearing a Candy Bag.
  • Wortox wearing a Candy Bag.
  • Wormwood wearing a Candy Bag.
  • Wurt wearing a Candy Bag.

plainText:
Candy Bag
"Only carries Hallowed Nights goodies."
Object Info
Perk
Stores Halloween Candies and Props.
Equipable
Can be Burned
Does not stack.
Crafting
×6
Filters
Tier
Always available
Miscellaneous
"candybag"
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Hallowed Nights
“It's some sort of delicious pocket dimension for sugary treats.”
–Wilson
“I'm gonna stuff so much candy in there!”
–Willow
“Is little bag for scary goodies!”
–Wolfgang
“It's for putting nice things in...”
–Wendy
“BAG FOR SWEETS”
–WX-78
“A festive bag for seasonal treats.”
–Wickerbottom
“That there bag could hold a whole heap of candy.”
–Woodie
“That's our sugar-sack.”
–Maxwell
“That we might carry öur sweetest plunders!”
–Wigfrid
“Treats, treats, treats!”
–Webber
“Where I keep all my confections!”
–Warly
“Holds sweet belly stuff!”
–Wormwood
“It's a goodybag.”
–Winona
“It's a Wortox Sack!”
–Wortox
“Sweets!!”
–Wurt
“I'm too old for that stuff. But maybe I'll help out the younger kids...”
–Walter
“It holds more than I expected, as if it's bigger on the inside...”
–Wanda
“A 14 slots container for holding Candies, Trinkets, and Decorations.”
-
A Candy Bag is a 14-slot container. It is similar to Backpack but can only store Halloween Candies, Hallowed Trinkets and Halloween Decorations, as well as regular Trinkets. It can be crafted with 6 Cut Grass.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Túi Kẹo là một hộp chứa 14 khe. Nó tương tự như Ba lô nhưng chỉ có thể lưu trữ Kẹo Halloween, Đồ trang sức thiêng liêng và Đồ trang trí Halloween, cũng như Đồ trang sức thông thường. Nó có thể được chế tạo với 6 Cỏ Cắt.

{{Scrapbook_Info|A 14 slots container for holding Candies, Trinkets, and Decorations.}}
A '''Candy Bag''' is a 14-slot container. It is similar to [[Backpack]] but can only store [[Halloween Candies]], [[Hallowed Trinkets]] and [[Halloween Decorations]], as well as regular [[Trinkets]]. It can be crafted with 6 [[Cut Grass]].

{{Clear}}
